revisions.*: Because "rvslots" was not specified, a legacy format has been used for the output. This format is deprecated, and in the future the new format will always be used.

'''VTS-2012-11
That course which a vessel intends to make good over ground, after allowing for the effect of currents, tidal streams, and leeway caused by wind and sea. (Be aware that this term does not equate to Course to Steer).

Source: IALA Guideline 1068 (2009)




(VTS33/output/8 refers) 

{{languages|Course to Make Good}}
